title: cerastium vagans f. fulvum
intro: Cerastium vagans f. fulvum, also known as a variety of the mountain chickweed plant, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Cerastium vagans f. fulvum include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, such as diarrhea and constipation, and its potential to support immune function. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of this plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
